_doc: Config for Product Discovery → Gaming (build-gaming.mjs, run by a GitHub Action). Keyless by default (CheapShark + Epic + Steam); set the optional ITAD_KEY secret to upgrade prices to EUR + full price history. Built to add categories (tech/books/…) and sources later.
_comment_stores: CheapShark store IDs to trust (skip grey-market keys). Names/icons come live from /stores; these are display overrides + an allowlist.
_comment_search: Direct store search URLs ({q}=encoded title) — used instead of the cheapshark.com/redirect affiliate link (which routes via cj.dotomi.com and is blocked by ad-blockers).
_comment_future: Reserved slots for sources not yet integrated.
